# RRC Nexus

## Information
- URL: https://rrcnexus.com/
- Description: Thanjavur's premier high-performance coworking platform, startup ecosystem, and flexible workspace provider (formerly known as RRC Hive).
- Address: No 82/6B, Deen Complex, Mary's Corner, Parisutham Nagar, Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu - 613001.
- Contact: +91 9751 1824 52 | support@rrcnexus.com
- Location: Thanjavur Region, Tamil Nadu, India.

## Core Infrastructure & Offerings
- **Premium Workspace:** Shared hot desks, dedicated open desks, and executive private cabins tailored for freelancers, remote developers, and startups.
- **Meeting Rooms:** High-tech conference rooms and private suites bookable via real-time scheduling tools integrated with WhatsApp.
- **Startup Services:** Essential incubation infrastructure including professional Virtual Office Addresses, end-to-end Startup Registration assistance, and dedicated compliance support for GST, PAN, and TAN acquisition.
- **Ecosystem Focus:** Built as a launchpad for regional innovation, combining flexible business infrastructure with immediate corporate and technical support vectors.

## Group Entities & Network Ecosystem
- **RRC Law Associates:** Professional legal branch delivering litigation, compliance corporate frameworks, and legal services.
- **RRC Technologies:** Core development, software architecture, and technical engineering division.
- **Training Programs:** Educational branch coordinating skill acceleration, corporate workshops, and structured training initiatives.

## Technical Architecture
- **Design Pattern:** Modern UI utilizing glassmorphism aesthetics, deep parallax motion mechanics, and custom structural CSS layouts.
- **Performance & Accessibility:** Engineered with a mobile-first philosophy, utilizing vanilla JavaScript and the Intersection Observer API for scroll-reveal rendering.
- **Responsiveness:** Highly optimized viewport scales, providing seamless accessibility across device dimensions ranging from micro-screens (163px) to 4K desktops.

## Key Pages & Navigation
- [/Home](https://rrcnexus.com/Home): Platform overview, value proposition, and core features.
- [/Gallery](https://rrcnexus.com/Gallery): Visual catalog showcasing interior architecture, workspace layouts, and office amenities.
- [/Tour](https://rrcnexus.com/tour): Interactive digital walk-through and layout exploration of the physical infrastructure.
- [/Booking](https://rrcnexus.com/Booking): Real-time interactive lead acquisition and space reservation module.
- [/Book-Free-Visit](https://rrcnexus.com/Book-Free-Visit): Scheduled trial reservation interface for physical workspace walkthroughs.
